<?php declare(strict_types=1); /* * This file is part of PHPUnit. * * (c) Sebastian Bergmann <sebastian@phpunit.de> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace PHPUnit\Framework\MockObject\Stub; use PHPUnit\Framework\MockObject\Invocation; use Throwable; /** * @no-named-arguments Parameter names are not covered by the backward compatibility promise for PHPUnit * * @internal This class is not covered by the backward compatibility promise for PHPUnit */ final readonly class Exception implements Stub { private Throwable $exception; public function __construct(Throwable $exception) { $this->exception = $exception; } /** * @throws Throwable */ public function invoke(Invocation $invocation): never { throw $this->exception; } }
